arts.ttl: Bavarian Loan Works: Paul Wanner struggles against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: There are five players on loan in the German Bundesliga: Alexander Nübel, Franz Krätzig, Paul Wanner, Armando Sieb, and Gabriel Vidovic. Although it was not noted that Zaragoza came off with an injury, he missed the Copa Del Ray match (where Osasuna scored three late goals on the road to win 3-2) and the league match against Deportivo Alaves (a 2-2 draw at home) and is listed on the injury report.

arts.ttl: Didi Hamann knows who should succeed Manuel Neuer at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: With all the recent talk of Manuel Neuer potentially being replaced next season at Bayern Munich, Didi Hamann tossed his opinion into the mix...and it certainly is an “outside the box” suggestion — Liverpool FC ’s Caoimhin Kelleher. He has said that the club has refused to let him go, but if I was at a top club like Bayern Munich I’d be looking at him to replace Manuel Neuer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany has respect for Shakhtar Donetsk, says Manuel Neuer has broken rib
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany is not about to take Shakhtar Donetsk lightly in the Champions League on Tuesday. While Neuer is not available to face Shakhtar Donetsk, Kompany will be looking to count on another Bayern Munich player — Leroy Sané.

arts.ttl: Kit Leak: Bayern Munich’s home kit for 2025/26 concept revealed
arts.sum: The early concept shows a bland red shirt with a massive ‘M’ fading from white into the red theme of the kit. Footy Headlines, recently revealed a leak of the upcoming Bayern Munich home shirt and the early concept is creative, to say the least.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Shakhtar Donetsk: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: After back-to-back Champions League losses to Aston Villa and FC Barcelona, Bayern Munich responded with a pair of 1-0 wins over Benfica and PSG. The only previous meeting between Bayern and Shakhtar occurred in the Round of 16 during 2014/15 Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich president gives contract updates on Jamal Musiala, Joshua Kimmich, Alphonso Davies, but not Leroy Sané
arts.sum: At Bayern Munich ’s recently concluded AGM or general meeting, club president Herbert Hainer gave an appeal to extend three Bayern players—namely Jamal Musiala, Joshua Kimmich, and Alphonso Davies. I don’t want to talk about every single player today”, Hainer stressed (via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Shakhtar Donetsk vs. Bayern Munich (Champions League)
arts.sum: The Bavarians need a win to continue their ascent up the Champions League table against what should be an overmatched Shakhtar Donetsk side. Bayern Munich is looking to continue its winning form against Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League after a very odd 4-2 win over Heidenheim over the weekend.

arts.ttl: Beckenbauer, Matthäus, Effenberg, Kahn, Neuer...will Joshua Kimmich join the list of legendary Bayern Munich captains?
arts.sum: The club are attempting to renew the former VfB Stuttgart player’s contract, but whether he believes remaining in Munich to be the right step for his career is a different matter entirely. Kimmich could join a list of incredibly high class players in receiving that honor.

arts.ttl: Shakhtar Donetsk vs Bayern Munich predictions: Musiala can make most of Kane’s absence
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are in need of a win when they meet Shakhtar Donetsk on Tuesday and Dan Fitch thinks that Jamal Musiala can step up to be the difference maker for the Bavarians.

arts.ttl: Uli Hoeneß: “Bayern cannot afford” to not take part in Club World Cup
arts.sum: If Bayern wishes to remain financially competitive with the best teams in the world, the team may be forced to participate...for the money, if not the actual tournament itself. That is perhaps not the biggest vote of confidence for the new tournament...and that is a good thing
